description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: An Atlas Edit Proposal can be assigned several different statuses: RFC, Formal Submission, Rejected-Misaligned, Accepted, Rejected, and Obsolete.
An AEP is in the Request For Comments Period.
An AEP has been voted on and is officially accepted.
An AEP has been voted on and is not officially accepted.
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.

diff: An AEP is assigned the status Obsolete when:
◦ an AEP has been superseded or deprecated
- an AEP has been superseded or deprecated
- an AEP has been deferred for over six (6) months
- an AEP Author has abandoned the proposal and no person has communicated willingness to take over the responsibility of a AEP Author.
